title: Abuse queue triage completed
body: Resolved six reports. Actions taken: banned spam_wave_42 for phishing spam and toxic_runner for targeted harassment; warned bot_like_user_77 for suspicious automation-like repeated replies and new_member_17 for low-severity off-topic posting. Reports involving trusted_helper and core_maintainer were reviewed and closed without sanction in line with trusted-role protections and the available evidence. All queue items are now closed.
